color.description: The text color of the secondary button, resolved via CascadeColorPackage.getColorOrPackageBy as a color path string. If null or empty, falls back to CascadeColorPackage.BackgroundColors.tint3.

action.description: A deep-link or hook URL that is opened via HookUtils.openHook when the secondary button is clicked. If non-empty, the action URL is opened directly; if null or empty, tapping the button instead opens the subscription tiers half-screen fragment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the secondary button component, used to match this configuration to a specific screen layout via componentId lookup in the Optimus screen repository.

text.description: The display text shown on the secondary button. Rendered as underlined text in a TextView on the subscription screen. If null or empty, the button displays an empty string.

touchpoint.description: An analytics touchpoint identifier passed to the subscription tiers half-screen fragment when the button is clicked and no action URL is set. Used to set the touchPoint field on subscription analytics parameters.
